item.title: Free Tasting: Salt Point Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Jun 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Salt Point has been crafting premium canned cocktails with all-natural ingredients along the coast of Northern California since 2013. Right here to be exact: 38.0834° N, 122.7633° W. Everyone at Salt Point is committed to quality ingredients and the finest of spirits. Though things can get a little foggy around there, they're clear about this: less is more. That’s why they keep the ingredients to a minimum and prefer to sail by the stars. So whether you’re hanging with old friends or interesting strangers, Salt Point invites you to kick back and raise a can. Come on in and give Salt Point a try with this free tasting of their premium canned drinks!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sipwell Canned Wine
item.description:
When: May 29 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Sipwell Wine Company is premium California wine with a can-do spirit. A female-founded and Black-owned company, they make award-winning canned wine that’s a little bit of a renegade. Sipwell sparkling wines are naturally can-conditioned, are fermented dry, meaning they have 0g sugar, and are sourced from organic or sustainably farmed grapes in California's Central Coast. These single-serve aluminum cans are infinitely recyclable, portable, and perfect for celebrating life's little moments.

item.title: Free Tasting: Livewire Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: May 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

LiveWire creates award-winning cocktails made by award-winning bartenders. The company's mission is to help further highlight the immensely talented bartenders that create brilliant drinks & nights, around the world. LiveWire bartender-collaborators design unique cocktails, using the finest spirits in the world, natural flavors and extracts, and choose the artists that design the art on the packaging to help their vision come alive. Come check out this bold new brand with a free tasting of their exciting ready-to-drink canned cocktails!

Where: Culver City

Branch Patty makes handcrafted Jamaican Patties and Coco Bread. They started in Brooklyn and now they're made in LA! They pair perfectly with wine and beer!

item.title: Free Tasting: Suncliffe Gin
item.description:
When: Apr 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come join us for a free tasting of this aromatic gin made with juniper berries from the twisted trees of Sedona, AZ.

item.title: Free Tasting: Morro Mezcal
item.description:
When: Apr 11 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Morro Mezcal crafts their small batch artisanal spirits using time-honored methods and traditions of mezcal production, using mature single origin agaves, an earthen hardwood-fueled oven, open air wooden fermentation vessels and small wood-fired copper still distillation. Their mezcals are distilled to proof using agaves grown in the mountains of El Gramal in Oaxaca giving depth, character and complexity.

item.description:

item.description:
When: Apr 7 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Song Cai is a first of its kind Vietnamese distillery bottling the taste and flavors of Viet Nam's biodiverse terroir through gins and other spirits. Come by and try their unique gins!

item.title: Free Tasting: Amante 1530
item.description:
When: Apr 4 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Hailing from the historic Il Palagio 1530 estate in Tuscany, this latest innovation in amaro offers a new take on an old classic; combining aromas of Italian citrus, ginger and honeysuckle to help you enjoy a unique bittersweet taste and a thoroughly delicious afternoon.

item.title: Free Tasting: Tequio Tequila
item.description:
When: Apr 3 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

item.title: Free Tasting: BTL SVC
item.description:
When: Apr 1 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

BTL SVC provides award-winning, hand-crafted, premium cocktails, conveniently served anytime and anywhere.

item.title: Free Tasting: Copalli Rum
item.description:
When: Mar 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Copalli's organic rums are crafted in Southern Belize at the Copal Tree Distillery, designed to run on biomass to have as low a carbon footprint as possible. Crafted from organic fresh sugar cane and proofed with "canopy water" collected straight from the rainforest, the Copal Tree Distillery supports sustainable agriculture, producing and selling premium organic, gluten-free spirits. Stop by and taste these delicious terroir driven spirits!

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Tacos Tekila
item.description:
When: Mar 29 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Tacos Tekila will be serving their mouth watering tacos and quesadillas. You can choose from Carne Asada, Al Pastor, Chorizo, or Pollo!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sipwell Canned Wine
item.description:
When: Mar 28 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Sipwell Wine Company is premium California wine with a can-do spirit. A female-founded and Black-owned company, they make award-winning canned wine that’s a little bit of a renegade. Sipwell sparkling wines are naturally can-conditioned, are fermented dry, meaning they have 0g sugar, and are sourced from organic or sustainably farmed grapes in California's Central Coast. These single-serve aluminum cans are infinitely recyclable, portable, and perfect for celebrating life's little moments.

item.title: Free Tasting: Zaddy's RTD Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Made for both gin lovers and non-gin lovers, Zaddy's RTD canned cocktails are low sugar, low ABV, gluten free, and super refreshing. Come on in and try Zaddy's creative, unique craft cocktails that are perfect all year round.

item.title: Free Tasting: Mama Chuy Gin
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample this refreshing Mexican gin. Distilled in small batches at the Satvrnal Distillery under Master Distiller Pedro Andres from a pristine base spirit produced by clean, swift fermentation and precise distillation. Vibrant lime zest greets the nose, with soft herbal bay leaf and classic juniper weaving a harmonious botanical tapestry; a crescendo of citrus brightens the palate before a light, coriander-driven spice on the finish.

item.title: Free Tasting: Granalta Blanco Tequila, Mezcal & Rum
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Come sample these incredible tequilas & mezcal from Granalta. Made in San Dioniso Ocotepec, Oaxaca by Miguel Martinez, these artisanal expressions are roasted with mesquite & oak, milled by Tahona, fermented in cypress wood & twice distilled in a copper pot still.

item.title: Free Tasting: Harland Brewing
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Carl from Harland Brewing in San Diego, California will be tasting beers to customers in store!

item.title: Free Tasting: Anytime Spritz + Farmhouse Organic Spirits
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Anytime Spritz makes organic and regenerative spirits & cocktails. Crafted by queer women, powered by farmers and the first climate negative distillery.

item.title: Free Tasting: Kastra Elion Vodka
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Long Beach

Family-owned and artisan-crafted in Greece, Kastra Elion is the original premium sipping vodka distilled from Greek olives. This premium vodka has unparalleled smoothness and timeless sophistication. Come get a taste of the Mediterranean with this free tasting!

item.title: Free Tasting: Salt Point Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Salt Point has been crafting premium canned cocktails with all-natural ingredients along the coast of Northern California since 2013. Right here to be exact: 38.0834° N, 122.7633° W. Everyone at Salt Point is committed to quality ingredients and the finest of spirits. Though things can get a little foggy around there, they're clear about this: less is more. That’s why they keep the ingredients to a minimum and prefer to sail by the stars. So whether you’re hanging with old friends or interesting strangers, Salt Point invites you to kick back and raise a can. Come on in and give Salt Point a try with this free tasting of their premium canned drinks!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sipwell Canned Wine
item.description:
When: Mar 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Sipwell Wine Company is premium California wine with a can-do spirit. A female-founded and Black-owned company, they make award-winning canned wine that’s a little bit of a renegade. Sipwell sparkling wines are naturally can-conditioned, are fermented dry, meaning they have 0g sugar, and are sourced from organic or sustainably farmed grapes in California's Central Coast. These single-serve aluminum cans are infinitely recyclable, portable, and perfect for celebrating life's little moments.

item.description:

Where: Long Beach

item.description:
When: Mar 6 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Culver City

We'll be sampling through 3 wines by Kolfolk. Winemaker, Stefan Wellanschitz is a natura wine maker in Austria in the Ödenburger Valley. He wants to avoid monoculture and prefers the grapes grow naturally together and whatever else might sprout up in between such as flowers and herbs. These wine are super fun and delicious!

item.title: Free Tasting: Bimini Gin + Death & Co Moonsail Fizz
item.description:
When: Mar 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Bimini Gin is the modern gin. It's handcrafted using a few familiar key botanicals— grapefruit zest, hops, coriander seed—that taste bright and citrusy with a beautiful floral aroma. Come by and try Bimini and Death & Co's Moonsail Fizz RTD, which features Bimini Gin!

item.title: Free Tasting: LiveWire Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 1 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

LiveWire creates award-winning cocktails made by award-winning bartenders. The company's mission is to help further highlight the immensely talented bartenders that create brilliant drinks & nights, around the world. LiveWire bartender-collaborators design unique cocktails, using the finest spirits in the world, natural flavors and extracts, and choose the artists that design the art on the packaging to help their vision come alive. Come try these exciting ready-to-drink canned cocktails and support the bartender community.

Madre is an artisanal mezcal, made by hand in the rolling hills of the Oaxacan Sierra. Come by and try their Ensamble, Espadín, and Desert Water, an RTD made only with artisanal mezcal, sparkling water, and real adaptogens, herbs & fruits.

item.title: Free Tasting: Lost Republic Bourbon & Rye

Lost Republic Distilling Co. was created by two best friends who had a vision of creating and delivering California's highest quality craft whiskey. Their Master Distiller has a keen attention to detail during the blending process, giving their whiskey flavor complexity and depth. Come try their small batch American whiskey produced right here in the heart of Sonoma.

LiveWire bartender-collaborators design unique cocktails, using the finest spirits in the world, natural flavors and extracts, and choose the artists that design the art on the packaging to help their vision come alive. item.description:
When: Feb 4 12:00 PM - 3:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

One of our favorite Long Beach food pop-ups, Eat Your Wave Burger, is coming to Costa Mesa! Eat Your Wave Burger is the delicious brainchild of Daria and Alex who moved to SoCal not so long ago with a dream to establish the best burger restaurant. Back in their country, they had a famous burger joint and decided that it was time to show their unique approach to the world. And isn't a smash burger the best place to start? Come join us this Saturday for some burgers and fun!

item.title: Free Tasting: Morro Mezcal
item.description:
When: Dec 17 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Morro Mezcal crafts their small batch artisanal spirits using time-honored methods and traditions of mezcal production, using mature single origin agaves, an earthen hardwood-fueled oven, open air wooden fermentation vessels and small wood-fired copper still distillation. Their mezcals are distilled to proof using agaves grown in the mountains of El Gramal in Oaxaca giving depth, character and complexity.

item.title: Free Tasting: Crown & Hops
item.description:
When: Dec 17 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Culver City

Based out of Inglewood, CA, Crown and Hops is the first black-owned, woman-owned, and veteran-owned brewery. Owners Beny Ashburn and Teo Hunter have disrupted the space and built a brand whose core mission is to create culture equity in the beer industry. Come by, show your support and try some of their wonderful beers!

item.title: Free Tasting: Lost Irish Whiskey
item.description:
When: Dec 2 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Lost Irish is an Irish Whiskey made from casks collected from six continents. Their triple distilled spirit combines all three styles of Irish Whiskey which balances flavor and complexity – the grain lends sweetness, the malt adds fruitiness, and the pot still contributes spice and cream. Stop by and try this smooth and delicious Irish Whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Rally Gin
item.description:
When: Nov 19 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Rally Gin is a California black and woman owned spirit company. Rally Gin is handcrafted and micro-distilled in small batches and is produced using 12 premium botanicals and Italian spices. Their distilling kettle is vapor-infused, giving a precise gin flavor profile. Come by and experience the difference in Rally Gin!
